'''Termadus''' was the [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] companion to the main sequence star [[Morasil]] in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. Termadus was a much younger star than its counterpart. A gaseous haze arose between the two due to Termadus drawing gases from Morasil's corona. Termadus, Morasil, and their haze gave off a combined light equivalent to a single bright star. Together, the two stars also created a much bigger [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] shadow than their individual profiles would call for.
